stemHtml: In a one-step de-icing/anti-icing, the holdover time (HOT) starts (1) _____, and decreases with (2) _____.

options.a: (1) At the end of the de-icing application; (2) high humidity.
options.b: (1) At the start of the anti-icing application; (2) low humidity.
options.c: (1) At the start of the de-icing / anti-icing application; (2) high humidity.
options.d: (1) At the end of the de-icing / anti-icing application; (2) low humidity.
